title: Minimal Radial Hud
description: Immerse more in-game with Radial Hotbar and Crosshair indicators!
body:
# Minimal Radial HUD
Tired of a cluttered HUD getting in the way of your gameplay? 

This mod shows essential stats like health and hunger are displayed seamlessly around your crosshair, giving you a clean, immersive screen while keeping critical information easily accessible. Press R to open the radial menu to select an item (assuming the keybind has not changed).

Perfect for explorers, combat players, and builders looking for a more engaging Minecraft experience!

On loadup, the HUD will be applied instantly. Press R to open radial and [ to revert back to standard Minecraft HUD. You are able to configurate some of the visuals such as the crosshair distance, radius size of the radial, and if the plus cross hair should be visible :)

![A player viewing the snowy peaks of a mountain with the sun peaking behind it. Player has a crosshair HUD in the center showing health and hunger.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6bd3b48b7fc487bb8c6835bbeed15d301fce78b.png)

This mod is currently only on NeoForge, but in sometime hopefully will include Fabric.

Note that that in terms of hearts, its only limited to one row. Future updates will hopefully add that feature. Theres a dedicated row for absorptions tho :D

Feel free to include this mod in your modpack as long as the mod and author is credited :)
